phrases.en: Dan and his friends drive to the bowling alley.
phrases.zh: 丹和他的朋友们开车去保龄球馆。

phrases.en: They pay for one lane at the front desk.
phrases.zh: 他们在前台付钱租了一条球道。

phrases.en: Dan rents a pair of smooth bowling shoes.
phrases.zh: 丹租了一双光滑的保龄球鞋。

phrases.en: He puts on the shoes and ties them tightly.
phrases.zh: 他穿上鞋子，把鞋带系紧。

phrases.en: Each friend picks a heavy ball from the rack.
phrases.zh: 每个朋友从球架上挑了一个沉重的球。

phrases.en: Dan slides his fingers into the three holes.
phrases.zh: 丹把手指插进球上的三个孔里。

phrases.en: They type their names into the score screen.
phrases.zh: 他们把名字输进计分屏幕里。

phrases.en: Dan takes the first turn and steps up to the line.
phrases.zh: 丹第一个上场，走到犯规线前。

phrases.en: He swings his arm back and rolls the ball quickly.
phrases.zh: 他向后摆臂，迅速把球滚了出去。

phrases.en: The ball rolls down the lane and knocks down the pins.
phrases.zh: 球沿着球道滚下去，把球瓶撞倒了。

phrases.en: They take turns and cheer for every good throw.
phrases.zh: 他们轮流上场，为每次漂亮的投球欢呼。

phrases.en: They watch their points go up on the score screen.
phrases.zh: 他们看着自己的分数在计分屏幕上往上涨。

phrases.en: Dan gets a strike and high-fives his friends.
phrases.zh: 丹打出了全中，和朋友们击掌庆祝。

phrases.en: At the end, they return the shoes and go home happy.
phrases.zh: 最后，他们归还了鞋子，开心地回家了。
